steps.title: Identify the antecedent
steps.content: The previous sentence introduces the word "rodeo." The blank must refer back to that word, which is singular and nonhuman, just as the earlier sentence uses "It" for "lasso."

steps.title: Reject human pronouns
steps.content: Choice B refers to a person generally, and Choice C and Choice D are gendered personal pronouns. None can clearly refer to the word "rodeo." The remaining option is the singular nonhuman pronoun. The answer is A.
